name: node-ip-regex
title: node-ip-regex
summary: Regular expression for matching IP addresses
description:
Regular expression for matching IP addresses
Returns a regex for matching both IPv4 and IPv6.
.
Only match an exact string. Useful with RegExp
to check if a string is an IP address.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-ip-regex because Regular expression for matching IP addresses.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-ip-regex as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-ip-regex with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-ip-regex --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
